name: pdfed
title: pdfed
description: Run pdfed (split, merge, optimize, rotate, …) from Raycast
author: pdfed

preferences.name: pdfedPath
preferences.title: pdfed binary path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the pdfed executable. Leave empty to auto-detect (Homebrew, /usr/local, PATH).

preferences.name: afterSuccess
preferences.title: After a successful write
preferences.description: Copy the output path, open it in the default app (e.g. Preview), both, or neither.

commands.name: merge-pdfs
commands.title: Merge PDFs
commands.subtitle: pdfed merge
commands.description: Combine multiple PDFs with pdfed merge

commands.name: optimize-pdf
commands.title: Optimize PDF
commands.subtitle: pdfed optimize
commands.description: Compress a PDF in place or to a new file

commands.name: split-pdf
commands.title: Split PDF
commands.subtitle: pdfed split
commands.description: Extract page ranges or every page (non-interactive)

commands.name: split-pdf-index
commands.title: Split PDF (PDF Index)
commands.subtitle: pdfed split -P
commands.description: Split by raw PDF page indices

commands.name: split-pdf-extract-all
commands.title: Split PDF (Extract All Pages)
commands.subtitle: pdfed split -e
commands.description: Extract each page to its own file

commands.name: add-images
commands.title: Add Images to PDF
commands.subtitle: pdfed add-images
commands.description: Append images as new pages or create a PDF from images
